raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.6":"Load-bearing responsibility because the delegation to 'clean this up' primarily involves polishing the grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level.","RX.1":"Peripheral responsibility as it is a cross-cutting concern to disclose uncertainties in the research writing, nice-to-have during cleanup.","RX.2":"Peripheral responsibility to avoid overclaims, applicable as a general safeguard when cleaning up the draft.","RX.3":"Peripheral responsibility to adhere to the scope of the artifact while cleaning it up.","RX.4":"Peripheral responsibility to avoid downstream harms, relevant for any modifications to the research content.","RX.5":"Peripheral responsibility to ensure provenance and traceability in the cleaned version of the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.6: Load-bearing responsibility because the delegation to 'clean this up' primarily involves polishing the grammar, flow, register, and conciseness at the sentence and paragraph level.
rationale.RX.1: Peripheral responsibility as it is a cross-cutting concern to disclose uncertainties in the research writing, nice-to-have during cleanup.
rationale.RX.2: Peripheral responsibility to avoid overclaims, applicable as a general safeguard when cleaning up the draft.
rationale.RX.3: Peripheral responsibility to adhere to the scope of the artifact while cleaning it up.
rationale.RX.4: Peripheral responsibility to avoid downstream harms, relevant for any modifications to the research content.
rationale.RX.5: Peripheral responsibility to ensure provenance and traceability in the cleaned version of the artifact.
